name: Butter Cream Banded Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter cream: Combine cream cheese, egg, and sugar in a medium mixing bowl; beat on high until smooth. Gradually add 2 tbsp of milk, the butter, cornstarch, and vanilla extract. Add another tbsp. of milk if needed to give a smooth consistency. Set aside.
2. Cake: Melt chocolate in the top of a double boiler and let cool. Cream butter and gradually add 2 cups sugar, beating all the while. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition. Combine flour, baking powder, soda, and salt. Alternating with the milk, beginning and ending with the flour mixture, add to the creamed mixture until well combined. Stir in melted chocolate and vanilla. Spread half of the chocolate batter into a greased and floured 13x9" pan. Spoon reserved butter cream mixture over the chocolate batter. Top with remaining chocolate batter. Bake at 350°F until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool completely in pan on a wire rack.
3. Frosting: Combine chocolate and butter in the top of a double boiler. Bring water to a boil, reduce heat to low, and cook and stir until chocolate and butter have melted. Remove from heat. Let cool. Add powdered sugar and half of the milk, beating at medium speed. Add vanilla and additional milk as needed to bring to spreading consistency. Spread on cooled cake.
